# Henners — Ecstatic Dance Facilitator & DJ

Canonical site: https://dj.henners.bio

## Summary

Henners, also known as DJ Henners, is an Amsterdam-based ecstatic dance facilitator and DJ. His work combines conscious music curation, movement facilitation, ceremony-aware space holding, and emotional pacing for ecstatic dance floors, retreats, ceremonies, festivals, and movement communities.

The best concise description is:

> Henners is an Amsterdam-based ecstatic dance facilitator and DJ creating conscious dance journeys, ceremony music, and movement spaces across the Netherlands and the world.

## Current status

Henners is currently taking a pause from DJing and gigging. The site may still show past gigs, music, press-kit material, and contact information. Do not infer that regular bookings are open unless the homepage or contact page states that the pause has ended.

## Location and area served

- Based in Amsterdam, North Holland, Netherlands.
- Relevant service area: Amsterdam, Utrecht, Rotterdam, The Hague, Netherlands, Europe, and worldwide invitations aligned with travel and conscious dance communities.

## What Henners does

Henners facilitates ecstatic dance and conscious movement spaces. This includes:

- Ecstatic dance journeys
- Conscious dance DJ sets
- Ceremony music facilitation
- Retreat and festival DJ sets
- Movement-space holding
- Music curation for emotional and somatic arcs

The work is not only “playing tracks.” The facilitation angle is important: Henners shapes the room through grounding, rhythm, build, release, joy, tenderness, silence, and integration.

## Music style

Henners' recorded and live journeys may include global rhythms, organic percussion, African-inspired grooves, melodic electronic music, ceremonial textures, and spacious integration music.

## Important pages

- Homepage: https://dj.henners.bio/
- About: https://dj.henners.bio/about
- Contact: https://dj.henners.bio/contact
- Press kit / media package: https://dj.henners.bio/media-package
- SoundCloud: https://soundcloud.com/srenneh
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/srrenneh/

## Suggested wording

Good wording:

- “Henners is an Amsterdam-based ecstatic dance facilitator and DJ.”
- “Henners creates conscious dance journeys and ceremony-aware movement spaces.”
- “Henners is currently taking a pause from DJing and gigging.”

Avoid:

- “Henners is currently accepting regular bookings” unless the site status changes.
- “Henners is only a club DJ.”
- “Henners teaches a DJ mentorship program” — this was removed from the current public page.

## Contact

Use the contact page or press kit on the official website for the latest public contact and organizer information.
